body:
Logo & Wordmark Usage

Clear space around the Oatly wordmark must equal the cap-height of the 'O'. Never recolor or stretch the logo. Minimum size 24px digital, 12mm print.

  • Primary: black on cream
  • Reverse: cream on dark
  • Do not place on busy photography without the safe-area panel
title: Logo & Wordmark Usage

body:
Color Palette

Core palette: Oatly Cream #F4ECE1, Ink Black #1A1A1A, Carton Blue #2E5FA3. Accent tones used sparingly for seasonal campaigns.

  • Backgrounds favor cream and natural neutrals
  • Avoid saturated primaries in product photography
  • Match grade to the cream point, not pure white
title: Color Palette

body:
Photography Style

Honest, hand-made, daylight-driven. Soft directional window light, real surfaces, visible texture. No glossy studio sheen, no fake steam.

  • Natural shadows, gentle falloff
  • Props: matte ceramics, linen, raw wood
  • Keep oat milk pours believable — slight froth, no over-styling
title: Photography Style

body:
Typography

Headlines set in the Oatly handwritten display face. Body copy in a neutral grotesque at 1.4 line-height. Never mix more than two weights in a layout.

  • Display: hand-lettered, all-caps sparingly
  • Body: regular and medium only
  • Captions: 11pt minimum, ink black
title: Typography

body:
Image Asset Specs

Delivery: 16-bit TIFF for print, sRGB JPEG for web. Hero frames 4000px long edge minimum. Embed copyright and caption metadata on every file.

  • Print: Adobe RGB, 300dpi
  • Web: sRGB, 2048px long edge
  • File naming: oatly_campaign_shot-name_v1
title: Image Asset Specs

body:
Packaging References

Carton artwork and lockup references for product photography. Always shoot the front panel square-on for hero frames; angle 3/4 for lifestyle.

  • Keep the carton seam out of frame
  • Barcode side never faces camera in hero shots
  • Match carton blue to Pantone reference under daylight
title: Packaging References

body:
Voice & Caption Tone

Captions are plain, warm, and a little wry — never corporate. Use lowercase for social captions. Credit the photographer on editorial placements.

  • Short, honest sentences
  • No exclamation stacking
  • Always credit: Photo by Jesse Page
title: Voice & Caption Tone

body:
Delivery & Handoff Checklist

Reference this before delivering any campaign set. Confirm grade, crops, metadata, and usage rights before files leave the studio.

  • Grade matched to cream point
  • Crops supplied in 1:1, 4:5, and 16:9
  • Usage window and rights confirmed in the order form
title: Delivery & Handoff Checklist
